summary: Tested form design presets feature in Apariencia page. All 7 design thumbnails (Aurora, Limpio, Compacto, Oscuro, Neón, Editorial, Cristal) present for both Nueva Reserva and Nuevo Socio sections. Design selection stores to localStorage and persists after reload. Forms visually apply the selected design.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Form design presets fully working. 7 thumbnails (aurora, limpio, compacto, oscuro, neon, editorial, cristal) visible for both reservation and socio design sections. Active selection shows checkmark badge + accent border. localStorage keys: reservation_form_design, socio_form_design. Editorial form shows warm beige bg + underline-only inputs. Limpio socio form shows white bg + gray inputs. Field visibility toggles from iteration_23 still working.
